INCOMPLETE PO XXXXX has been deemed as incomplete as we no longer believe that this PO will be fulfilled in a reasonable amount of time. Because this PO has already been replaced previously, we are asking that you please work with the customer to provide an alternative resolution that is in their best interest. Thank you,
